title: cynosurus polydactylon
intro: Cynosurus polydactylon, also known as Dactyloctenium aegyptium, is a type of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Cynosurus polydactylon include treating digestive issues, respiratory problems, and skin infections, as well as having anti-aging and antioxidant properties. Herbal preparations of Cynosurus polydactylon can be made into teas, infusions, and decoctions, and are often used in Ayurvedic and Unani medicine.
